name: 2gal Glass Modern Beverage Dispenser - Threshold™: Cold Drink Holder, 2 Gallon Capacity, Stainless Steel & Wood
description:
Give your kitchen counter a stylish twist with this 2-gallon Glass Beverage Dispenser from Threshold. Fill it up with lemon-infused water or a cool fruity drink, then let friends & family help themselves. If you’re not satisfied with any Target Owned Brand item, return it within one year with a receipt for an exchange or a refund.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
